questions.question: Are all 3 quiz question types (single, multi, flashcard) rendered with correct UI components?
questions.actionable_check: Navigate to /topic/javascript-basics and verify SingleChoiceQuestion (radio buttons), MultiChoiceQuestion (checkboxes + submit), FlashcardQuestion (front/reveal/assess) components
questions.pass_criteria: All 3 types render correctly with appropriate input controls

questions.question: Does the scoring engine correctly implement Type A (+1/-0), Type B (+1/-1 floor 0), Type C (+1/0)?
questions.actionable_check: Review src/lib/scoring.ts scoreQuestion function for each type
evidence_required: scoring.ts source with all 3 scoring implementations
questions.pass_criteria: scoreQuestion correctly handles all 3 types with correct math

questions.question: Do quiz answers persist in lp_progress_v1 after page refresh?
questions.actionable_check: Answer a question, refresh, verify same answer is shown
questions.pass_criteria: Answer recorded before refresh appears correctly after reload

questions.question: Do Prev/Next navigation buttons allow moving between questions without losing answers?
questions.actionable_check: Answer question 1, navigate to Q2, navigate back to Q1 — answer still shown
questions.pass_criteria: Navigation works in both directions; answers persist in-memory

questions.question: Does answering all questions trigger the quiz summary screen with retry option?
questions.actionable_check: Answer all 5 questions in javascript-basics topic, verify 'Quiz Complete!' appears with retry button
questions.pass_criteria: Summary shows total points and retry button after all questions answered

mandatory_questions.question: Do all 9 Story 03 Playwright E2E tests pass?
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: All quiz engine E2E tests pass including all quiz types, navigation, persistence, completion

mandatory_questions.question: Do all previous story E2E tests still pass (12 total from stories 01 and 02)?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: Run story-01 and story-02 test files
